recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Through My Window: Across the Sea
recommendations.overview: After a year of long-distance, Raquel and Ares reunite on a steamy beach trip. Faced with fresh flirtations and insecurities, will their love prevail?

recommendations.title: Grosse Pointe Blank
recommendations.overview: Hitman Martin Blank becomes a moving target after he rebuffs a fellow assassin's invitation to form a union. On the advice of his quirky assistant and neurotic psychiatrist, Martin begrudgingly heads out to Grosse Pointe, Michigan for his ten-year hi

recommendations.title: The Voyeurs
recommendations.overview: When Pippa and Thomas move into their dream apartment, they notice that their windows look directly into the apartment opposite – inviting them to witness the volatile relationship of the attractive couple across the street. But what starts as a simp

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: The Green Ray
recommendations.overview: A lonely Parisian woman comes to terms with her isolation and anxieties during a long summer vacation.

recommendations.title: Us Again
recommendations.overview: In a vibrant city pulsating with rhythm and movement, an elderly man and his young-at-heart wife rekindle their youthful passion for life and each other on one magical night.

recommendations.title: Love on Safari
recommendations.overview: An American web designer inherits an animal reserve in South Africa. A no-nonsense ranger takes her on a safari in hopes that she will fall in love with the land, the animals and him.

recommendations.title: eXistenZ
recommendations.overview: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.
